title: Lobelia archboldiana
intro: Lobelia archboldiana, also known as Archbold's Lobelia, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as asthma and bronchitis. The bioactive constituents of Lobelia archboldiana include lobeline, lobelanine, and other alkaloids, which have been shown to have a range of physiological effects. In herbal medicine, Lobelia archboldiana is often used in preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, which are traditionally used to relieve respiratory symptoms and promote relaxation.
